prompt: Studio product photograph of a matte black 24-ounce double-wall stainless steel insulated tumbler with a black plastic flip-top lid and matching black reusable straw extending up from the lid. The tumbler stands centered on a smooth concrete-grey textured surface against a soft blurred light-grey backdrop. The tumbler body is COMPLETELY BLANK, UNBRANDED, with NO logos, NO etching, NO print, NO graphics, NO text anywhere — a plain unmarked mockup ready for custom branding application. Three-quarter angle from slightly above eye-level, soft overhead studio light catches a subtle highlight along the left edge of the cylindrical body. Slightly desaturated near-monochrome palette. Working-class product-catalog aesthetic, documentary feel. No drink visible inside, no condensation, no people.
